title: OpenMetadata Overview
content: OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance. It provides a central metadata repository, column-level lineage, and collaboration features.

title: Lineage in OpenMetadata
content: Data Lineage in OpenMetadata allows you to trace data from its origin to its destination. It supports table-level, column-level, and pipeline lineage across tools like dbt, ClickHouse, Airflow, and Snowflake.

title: ClickHouse Connector
content: The ClickHouse connector ingests metadata, lineage, and profiler metrics from ClickHouse databases. It supports capturing materialized views and materialized models accurately using regex parsing.
